build.beforeBuildCommand: node -e "const p=require('path').resolve(__dirname,'../../soloncode-cli/target/soloncode-cli.jar');if(!require('fs').existsSync(p)){console.error('');console.error('ERROR: soloncode-cli.jar not found');console.error('  Expected: soloncode-cli/target/soloncode-cli.jar');console.error('  Run: cd soloncode-cli && mvn clean package -DskipTests');console.error('');process.exit(1)}" && pnpm build
